assertions.title: Action failures do not leave the TUI hung

steps.action: Open the shipped TUI via `pnpm dev:tui --url http://localhost:3100 --company-id 02921aac-24ac-43cb-a92e-5c8ec7bdb2bc` and confirm it is input-ready.
steps.expected: The console is interactive before the failure test starts.
steps.observed: The TUI launched into TUI Recovery Audit with `> Type a message...` and Codex connected.

steps.action: Submit an explicit failing operator request from the TUI: `POST /api/orchestrator/agents/b92ad482-c090-4ce4-8ae9-7cd77d008b67/nudge. Don't create issues.`
steps.expected: The TUI shows a temporary thinking state while the request is processed.
steps.observed: The TUI showed both `Orchestrator: thinking...` in chat and `Waiting for response...` in the input bar.

steps.action: Wait for the request to complete and compare the visible failure against a supporting direct nudge call.
steps.expected: A visible failure is rendered and the console returns to an input-ready state with no stuck thinking indicator.
steps.observed: The chat rendered `Failed: Agent has no active assigned issues with a project to nudge`, the footer returned to `Codex: connected`, and the prompt returned to `> Type a message...`; the supporting `curl` transcript showed the same 400 error.

assertions.title: TUI run state matches company-scoped API status

steps.action: Trigger a real run with `POST /api/agents/b92ad482-c090-4ce4-8ae9-7cd77d008b67/heartbeat/invoke` while the TUI session is open.
steps.expected: A new live run is created for the scoped company.
steps.observed: The invoke response returned 202 with runId `26f80af6-5519-4d7c-9c88-c58c5641363b`.

steps.action: Observe the TUI during the live run.
steps.expected: The header/sidebar active-run indicators reflect the live run.
steps.observed: The TUI showed `Connected | 1 agent | 1 active run`, `Audit CEO (running · 1 live run)`, and a run-inspection row for `26f80af6 · running`.

steps.expected: The company-scoped API reports the same active run identity/count seen in the TUI.
steps.observed: The API snapshot reported `totalActiveRuns: 1` and `activeRuns[0].runId = 26f80af6-5519-4d7c-9c88-c58c5641363b`, matching the TUI header and run-inspection panel.

assertions.title: TUI exposes a concrete run-output or result inspection path

steps.action: Use the TUI sidebar `Run inspection` section while the live run is in progress.
steps.expected: A concrete run row is visible from the TUI alone, not just an aggregate count.
steps.observed: During execution the sidebar showed `26f80af6 · running` with `Result/output` and the placeholder `Waiting for persisted output…`.

steps.action: Wait for run `26f80af6-5519-4d7c-9c88-c58c5641363b` to finish and re-check the same in-TUI inspection area.
steps.expected: The TUI surfaces concrete result/output text for the finished run without leaving the TUI.
steps.observed: The same `Run inspection` panel updated to `26f80af6 · succeeded` and displayed the persisted summary beginning `Running another heartbeat cycle now...` directly in the sidebar.

steps.action: Cross-check the completed run through the company-scoped API.
steps.expected: The API recent-runs view contains the same run and result summary seen in the TUI.
steps.observed: The post-run status snapshot showed `recentRuns` containing run `26f80af6-5519-4d7c-9c88-c58c5641363b` with a matching `resultSummaryText` excerpt.

frictions.description: tuistory text entry dropped several characters on the first attempt to induce the nudge failure, and the orchestrator interpreted the garbled request as vague new work instead of a direct failing action.
frictions.resolution: Retried with an explicit endpoint-level nudge instruction and verified the visible 400 failure plus recovered input-ready state; recorded the unintended issue creation as trace evidence.

summary: Tested 3 assertions for the TUI Recovery Audit company. VAL-RUN-006 passed because the shipped TUI matched `/api/orchestrator/status` for live run `26f80af6-5519-4d7c-9c88-c58c5641363b`; VAL-RUN-008 passed because the sidebar exposed concrete result text for that run; VAL-ORCH-006 passed because an explicit failing nudge request surfaced the 400 error and returned the console to an input-ready state.
